it increases poison applied, it doesn't double dip and increase the damage poison deals

E0
E2
E3 

All work very well.

E0 - good dmg boost support with decent sub carry 

E2 - less clunkiness, more dmg to clear mobs

E3 - 2x the supporting capabilities from e0
Well more than 2x tbh but yeah
looks very nice, i have e1 rn and was going to stop at e2 🤔  i quite like gdoll's design as well so i might consider that suggestion. who would she replace in the original team?
I think you're overrating e3. A huge portion of her supportive capabilities comes from divine ultra and e3 doesn't buff those
Casiah or winkle

It's the boost after pursuit.

E0 stacks is 5 x2 dmg amp

E3 is 10x2 dmg amp
The singularity prism part
At a rough base, it goes from 30% final amp (3x5x2) to potentially 100% final amp (5x10x2)

+ the original 15 singularity so..

60% to 130%
L is typing for very long <:Ogier_Cheerup:1468259351889318049>

The first 5 cards aren't going to have the full boost, and if you enter the burst turn without the 5 stacks but her pursuit cards in hand, you can still get more stacks at e0 by spending the 3 stacks, using pursuit cards, then getting more stacks
Also this ignores all the dmg Amp she gives and the 25 stacks from cards on Ultra bar

Realistically, if she's being played as a support, and not built around as a dps, I think we're not going to get the 5 stacks buffs on too many cards, and if we do it on ultra round the value is lower because ultra turn cards have 25 stacks so the increase % is lower, and it doesn't buff the dmg Amp she gives, so I'd expect the buff to be closer to 50%, assuming max pursuits
well u have 5 arith here, and generally u dont rly get more outside of relics
some supports give u 1 arith here and there but it not always

for vortrice persuit, you need to play her 2cost card then exalt on someone to trigger persuit, the persuit dmg is very good but needs to be leveled up first
you need to level up her 2 cost card
Arit points

Also, since pursuit stacks between battle, you can stack up pursuit to have 5 pursuit essily

You need to play 5 cards first though, it's not easy to play 5 cards and then shattered.

If you can, and if have her pursuit in hand, you can still play 3 cards - play her pursuit - play something else to get 4 or 5 stacks at e0 - shattered.

If you use a shattered from ultra bar, you still go from 15+25+3x5 =55 stacks to 15+25+5x10 = 90 stacks which is closer to a 64% increase.

Then, you have to consider e3 does nothing from dmg Amp, which is also part of her supportive capabilities, and it's going to be boosting shattered dmg and counter quite a bit too
I was using this lineup after reading the compendium, but those R cards sound insane now that I read them LMAO thank youuu

you don't really need aigis

You can set up the pursuits during the turn before ultra round.

Anhilate- arachane exalt - play card - ultra round.

This can be done by either 

1. Start battle with 5 cards in ultra

2. Arachane rouse with 4 cards. Play card, Anhilate, play another card - ultra round.

I set up the procs by having celeste 0 cost either in hand or ultra round.

Might not be easy to get all 5 stacks during ultra, but it's okay for some halberd to be at 3 4 stacks.

I havent tried e3 arachane in practice yet. But doable from my e0 experience

I understand that it can be done, what I'm saying is that you can cut the gap at e0, so if you play smart you realistically won't see a 100% increase at E3
With skill, players can cut the gap at e0. Without skill, they don't maximize the performance of e3

TLDR, E3 more boost.

More skill even more boost?
Basically yeah 😜

I have two teams I want to try Arachne in
Team 1: Castor, Horla, Kath, Clementine

Team 2: Castor, Horla, Thais, Jenkin

who should I replace in each team and why? (please don't say it's castor, I love him 😭)
Depends on wheter you want to play Arachne as the main dps or supp
For main dps you replace Kath, for supp you replace Clem if you don't want to replace Castor
E3 caecus but e0 arachane
If I wanted to play dps Arachne wouldn't the Castor, Horla, Thais comp be better for that?
For team 2 I'd say Thais and focus on corrosion dmg with Arachne to finish
Yeah
Or replace Castor with someone with a bit more synergy
Problem is Arachne can't trigger corrosion

thanks for the advice!
She is, but she doesn't have much synergy with Castor, so might as well put her on a team with more synergy
In that comp with Castor Jenkin Arachne, Castor is going to be the main star
Arachne can burst the enemies, but Castor is going to be holding the fort and doing some consistent dmg from corrosion
which would you say is stronger, Castor, Jenkin Horla Arachne, or the same team but with Jenkin swapped for Kath?
Kath 100%, she's a much stronger char as long as she's E3+
she works well with castor because she buffs castor shielding and his plumes are good at triggering arachne pursuit
u still need a main carry to trigger castor corrosion
